hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) d=$(dirname "$f"); while [ "$d" != "." ] && [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$d/package.json" ]; do d=$(dirname "$d"); done; if [ -f "$d/package.json" ]; then rel=${f#$d/}; (cd "$d" && npx eslint "$rel" --no-warn-ignored); fi ;; esac; } 2>&1 || true

hookrc=0; for d in */; do d=${d%/}; if [ -f "$d/package.json" ]; then if node -e "const p=require('./'+process.argv[1]+'/package.json'); process.exit(p.scripts && p.scripts.test ? 0 : 1)" "$d"; then (cd "$d" && npm test) || hookrc=1; else (cd "$d" && npm run check) || hookrc=1; fi; fi; done; exit $hookrc
